title: gmelina fasciculiflora
intro: Gmelina fasciculiflora is a medicinal plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the stick-in-the-mud tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Gmelina fasciculiflora include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Gmelina fasciculiflora include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
